name: Jellyfink
description: Connect to remote Jellyfin servers and present their libraries locally without copying media.
overview: Remote Jellyfin library sharing - a metadata and playback bridge.

versions.changelog: Jellyfink 1.0 — share remote Jellyfin libraries locally (no media copied). Movies & TV, secure Proxy streaming, remote metadata, two-way watch state & favorites, subtitle sidecars, REMOTE library badge, tabbed config page, and a dedicated jellyfink.log. Requires Jellyfin 10.11+.
